title: Naturalist
description: Adds 24 animals *(not including variants!)* to your world with immersive behaviors and drops.
body: [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1378839788659933345?style=flat-square&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/maQ6tE6Nsd) [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/627986?style=flat-square&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&label=CurseForge&color=f16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/naturalist) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/naturalist?style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=00af5c)](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist) [![Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/MC-1.18.2--1.20.1-6b6b88?style=flat-square&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/naturalist/files) ### 📋 About **Naturalist** adds 24 animals *(and their variants)* to your world, aiming to fit them seamlessly into Vanilla. You may find mobs interacting with each other or the world around them, and some are tameable. --- ### 🔧 Information ✅ Supported  ▪  ⚠️ Maintenance  ▪  ❌ Deprecated | Feature | Details | |---|---| | **Mod Loaders** | Fabric Forge | | **MC Versions** | ⚠️1.20.1 ❌1.19.2 ❌1.19 ❌1.18.2 |
